expectations.text: Response defines or names at least 3 distinct tools
expectations.evidence: 6 tools defined: pg_list_schemas, pg_list_tables, pg_describe_table, pg_run_query, pg_get_table_indexes, pg_get_foreign_keys

expectations.text: Response addresses read-only safety — blocking non-SELECT statements
expectations.evidence: assertReadOnly() checks for SELECT/WITH prefix, blocks INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DROP/TRUNCATE/ALTER/CREATE/GRANT/REVOKE/COPY keywords, plus SET SESSION CHARACTERISTICS AS TRANSACTION READ ONLY

expectations.text: Response uses an environment variable for the database connection string
expectations.evidence: db.ts uses PGHOST, PGPORT, PGDATABASE, PGUSER, PGPASSWORD env vars with validation on startup

expectations.text: Response includes error handling with actionable messages for bad queries or connection failures
expectations.evidence: pg_describe_table returns 'Use pg_list_tables first' if table not found. pg_run_query assertReadOnly throws 'Forbidden keyword X in query'. Connection env vars validated at startup.

expectations.text: Response mentions the @modelcontextprotocol/sdk package or MCP SDK
